description_long: This ornate ceiling-mounted sconce features a central stem with intricate scrollwork arms radiating outward, each supporting a lampshade. The shades are made of frosted glass with delicate floral patterns in red and yellow, giving the fixture a vintage and decorative appearance. The arms and central structure are crafted from a gold-toned metal, adorned with sculpted leaf and flower motifs at the base. The fixture holds eight individual lampshades, each evenly spaced around the central axis. The overall design is elegant and classical, reminiscent of antique European chandeliers. The sconce is intended to be a statement piece, providing both illumination and decorative flair to upscale urban interiors.
description: An ornate, gold-toned ceiling sconce with eight frosted glass floral-patterned lampshades and intricate scrollwork arms, exuding a vintage, classical style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical arrangement of all eight floral-patterned lampshades and the detailed scrollwork arms.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the depth of the scrollwork and the distribution of the lampshades around the central stem.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the curvature of the arms and the sculpted leaf motifs at the base.
description_view_3: Rear angled view revealing the back arrangement of the lampshades and the ornate central stem.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has a vintage, classical design with ornate scrollwork, sculpted leaves, and floral-patterned glass shades, evoking an antique European aesthetic.
